creator: jo_t@gmx.net
text:
The website http://www.freebsd.org/ and all sub-sites are not reachable with the web browser Opera 9.22. The "Could not connect to remote server" page appears.

Firefox works fine. The german mirror at http://www.de.freebsd.org/ works fine with Opera.

Tested on Windows XP client.
Opera 9.22
Firefox 2.0.0.5
